name: Shockwave Pistons
effect: When you jump you craete a Burst 1 section of Difficult Terrain from where you jumped. You gain +2 Horizontal jump range on Vertical jumps.

name: Missile Minefield
effect: Choose a space within Range 5 of you. You create a Blast 1 Area that deals 1d6 AP Explosive Damage.

effect.detail: Your mech gains the AI tag and the AGGRESSIVE OVERWATCH Reaction

abilities.detail: Your attacks gain +2 knockback. You gain the Graceful Dance Reaction. This effect ends at the start of your next turn.
abilities.trigger: An ally within range 5 takes damage
abilities.detail: You may Skirmish for 1/2 damage. If this attack hits the attacker must make a Hull Save or fall Prone.
